findings.rationale: Scope 1/2 emissions are disclosed with figures, but Scope 3 is never mentioned — the value chain (typically the majority of the footprint) is omitted entirely.
A long-dated target (2040-2060) and a net-zero/neutrality claim appear, but no interim milestone year (2025-2039) is stated — a promise with no nearer checkpoint.
This claim states a reduction in environmental footprint without providing a baseline value or year.
findings.quote: We have made significant reductions in our environmental footprint and continue to improve year over year across all areas of our operations and value chain.

findings.rationale: The company claims carbon neutrality today, but explicitly states it is achieved primarily through purchased offsets, indicating a reliance on offsets rather than operational reductions. The phrase "overwhelming majority" strongly supports this.
findings.quote: We are pleased to announce that GreenWash Co. is carbon neutral today, achieved primarily through the purchase of high-quality carbon offsets from verified projects around the world. Offsets account for the overwhelming majority of our stated neutrality.

findings.rationale: The report uses superlative language such as 'industry-leading' and 'world-class leader' to describe the company's sustainability efforts without providing any supporting data.
findings.quote: At GreenWash Co. we are proud to be an industry-leading, world-class leader in corporate sustainability.
